claims.summary: Verify legacy warmth markers remain stable and independently observable when projected semantic dimensions change.
Verify entropy vibrancy lift is smooth and bounded rather than an on/off static buzz.
Observe whether low semantic admission yields a rhythm/density-dominated fingerprint in an exact current-state replay.
Any entropy-velocity-dependent live vibrancy decay, codec gain, or feedback mapping change remains Tier 5 pending Mike/operator approval.
